Investigation_Area.name: MAVEN with Neutral Gas and Ion Mass Spectrometer

Observing_System_Component.name: Neutral Gas and Ion Mass Spectrometer
Observing_System_Component.description: The MAVEN Neutral Gas and Ion Mass Spectrometer (NGIMS) instrument description is included in the MAVEN NGIMS Software Interface Specification (SIS) file 'ngims_pds_sis.docx' in the document collection of the MAVEN NGIMS bundle.

Observing_System_Component.name: MAVEN
Observing_System_Component.description: The MAVEN spacecraft description document is included as a secondary member of the document collection of the MAVEN NGIMS bundle.

Table_Delimited.name: Calibrated NGIMS Housekeeping Values
Table_Delimited.description: A sparsely-populated spreadsheet containing all housekeeping values for given times.

Field_Delimited.name: TIME
Field_Delimited.description: Spacecraft Clock (SCLK) counter value, as approximated by NGIMS's internal clock, at the time of the observations in the given row.

Field_Delimited.name: MKID
Field_Delimited.description: The numeric ID of the most recent marker to occur at TIME.

Field_Delimited.name: QMS:ADC_LATCHUP_STATUS
Field_Delimited.description: Value of QMS:ADC_LATCHUP_STATUS at TIME, in fully interpreted scientific units. For more information on the meaning of QMS:ADC_LATCHUP_STATUS, consult the appendices of the 'ngims_pds_sis.docx' document included in the 'documents' collection of this bundle. If no value is present for a given TIME, then the value was not read at TIME; no effort is made to interpolate between readings.

If no value is present for a given TIME, then the value was not read at TIME; no effort is made to interpolate between readings.
